name: ies-allow-list
note: Plain page capture. 'url' is a best-guess from the original filename — open the page in your browser and paste the REAL url here if it differs.

name: ies-allow-list-new-rule-modal
note: MODAL example — clicks the button that opens the dialog, waits for it, then captures the full page with the modal open. Replace the selector with the real one (right-click the button in the browser → Inspect to find it, or just use interactive mode instead).

name: edr-esm-sites-detail-drawer
note: DRAWER example — opens a side drawer by clicking a row, then captures. Selectors are placeholders.

name: modal-only-element-shot
note: Optional: capture ONLY the modal element (tight crop) instead of the whole page, by setting clipSelector.
